request.resume_text: Backend engineer with 4 years of Python. Built and operated FastAPI microservices, designed PostgreSQL schemas, and set up CI pipelines with GitHub Actions. Comfortable with Docker.
request.job_description_text: We are hiring a Backend Engineer. Must have strong Python, experience building REST APIs, relational databases (PostgreSQL), and containerization with Docker. Kubernetes is a plus.

request.resume_text: Frontend developer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built responsive UIs and design systems. Some Node.js scripting.
request.job_description_text: Senior Backend Engineer needed: deep Python, distributed systems, message queues (Kafka), and PostgreSQL at scale.

request.resume_text: Data Scientist mit 3 Jahren Erfahrung. Python, pandas, scikit-learn, und Aufbau von ML-Modellen. Erfahrung mit SQL und Datenvisualisierung.
request.job_description_text: Wir suchen einen Machine Learning Engineer mit Python, Erfahrung im Deployment von Modellen (MLOps), Docker und Cloud (GCP).
